<!--
  This GitHub repository is a READ-ONLY MIRROR of the canonical GitLab project.
  Pull requests opened here cannot be merged and will not be reviewed.
-->

## GitHub is a read-only mirror — pull requests are not accepted here

Thank you for your interest in contributing to TruePPM.

**GitHub is a read-only mirror** of the canonical repository, which lives on GitLab:

> **Canonical source:** https://gitlab.com/trueppm/trueppm

All contributions — bug fixes, features, and docs — are made as **merge requests on
GitLab**, not as pull requests here. Please close this PR and re-open your change on
GitLab instead:

1. Fork or branch from [`gitlab.com/trueppm/trueppm`](https://gitlab.com/trueppm/trueppm).
2. Read the [Contributing guide](https://gitlab.com/trueppm/trueppm/-/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
3. Open a merge request against `main` on GitLab.

Issues and discussion also happen on GitLab:
[gitlab.com/trueppm/trueppm/-/issues](https://gitlab.com/trueppm/trueppm/-/issues).
